message:
feat(core): expand AST, error catalog, query planner, and top-level crate

Build out the core SQL processing pipeline with substantial new
functionality across four foundational crates:

- fsqlite-ast (+597 lines): extend the AST node types to cover
  window functions, CTEs, UPSERT clauses, compound SELECT operators,
  and expression tree visitors for query analysis
- fsqlite-error (+726 lines): comprehensive error code catalog
  mapping upstream SQLite extended result codes to structured Rust
  error types with context propagation and error chain support
- fsqlite-planner (+856 lines total): bytecode codegen backend for
  translating logical plans to VDBE-style opcodes; planner lib gains
  cost model, join reordering heuristics, and index selection logic
- fsqlite top-level (+371 lines): connection lifecycle, prepare/step/
  finalize statement API, and database handle management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
